reviews.comment:
Mal servicio :-( arreglaron solo algunas cosas, no hicieron el diagnostico gratis que dicen hacer, no verificaron todo lo necesario para aprobar la VTV y por eso luego de salir del taller y hacer la VTV no fue aprobada y quedó con observaciones. Tengo que volver.

(Translated by Google)
Bad service :-( They only fixed a few things, didn't do the free diagnostic they advertise, and didn't check everything necessary to pass the vehicle inspection. Because of this, after leaving the shop and getting the inspection done, it failed and received warnings. I have to go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBM1ltMkZ3EAE
